before: This questionnaire is for educational purposes only and is NOT a clinical diagnosis. Results are for personal reflection. If you have concerns or severe symptoms, please consult a healthcare professional. Your answers are stored only in your browser.
after: This test is NOT a clinical diagnosis and does NOT replace evaluation by a professional. If you have severe or persistent symptoms, please consult your doctor or psychologist.
crisisFooter: In case of crisis call 988 (free, 24h) or 911.
